references.passiveText: There's a retired master crafter living in solitude who could judge this competition fairly.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} was the finest artisan in the region before they retired to a homestead {location_hint}. Neither of our competing crafters would dare question their judgment. If someone could convince them to come out of retirement long enough to judge the contest, both sides would have to accept the result. Getting there isn't easy: the road is rough and the {enemy_type} have been active.
